Our services
Coffin BoxesFreezer Box on RentHearse VanEmbalming & DressingInternational Repatriation

Available day and night, every day

77609 11567 79967 94943
Crafted with reverence

Coffin boxes, chosen with care.

Premium wooden and standard coffins, prepared with cross, lining and floral dressing, to honour your loved one within your budget.

Call now: 77609 11567
A dignified selection

For every budget, without compromise

We keep a wide range of coffins to suit different budgets. Each one is made with care to give your loved one a dignified resting place.

Our team helps you choose the right size, material and finish, and makes sure every religious and personal requirement is honoured.

  • Premium polished wood & standard options
  • Cross, satin lining and fittings included
  • Fresh flower arrangement on request
  • All sizes, delivered with the hearse
Dressed & ready

Prepared by hand, flowers and all

Every coffin leaves us fully dressed: cross fitted, lining pressed, handles polished and fresh flowers arranged on the lid. Nothing is left for your family to organise.

Tell us the size and finish you need, and we will have it ready and delivered with the hearse.

A range to choose from

Finishes for every farewell

Tap any photograph to view it larger. Every coffin shown here is one we prepare ourselves.

Speak to us. We'll guide you gently through the options.

Tell us your needs and budget; we will arrange everything respectfully.

77609 11567 Get directions

Day or night, we answer

We are here when you need us.

St. Paul’s Funeral Undertakers

Dignified, budget-friendly funeral arrangements: ambulance, mortuary and repatriation services across Bangalore and beyond.

“Precious in the sight of the Lord
is the death of his faithful servants.”Psalm 116:15

Services

  • 24/7 Ambulance
  • Freezer Box on Rent
  • Coffin Boxes
  • Hearse Van
  • Embalming & Dressing
  • International Repatriation
